name: Captrix caption styling controls
description: Checks simple caption style, position, size, and preset controls.

planSteps.description: The page shows Shorts, Meme Stack, Middle, and the caption size display shows 22px.
Click data-testid=style-minimal, click data-testid=position-bottom, and move data-testid=caption-size to a larger value if the runner supports range controls.
data-testid=caption-overlay and data-testid=video-stage remain visible after the style controls are used.
